highlights.description: Rename to schemakit and add doc command for Markdown documentation generation

added.description: `schemakit doc` command to generate Markdown documentation from Go struct types
Extract package doc comments, type descriptions, and field comments via reflection
Generate required/optional field tables with JSON names and types
Support `--title` and `--version` flags for documentation headers

documentation.description: Update README with schemakit branding and doc command usage
Add Go-first workflow diagram showing generate and doc commands

highlights.description: Generate JSON Schema from Go struct types using invopop/jsonschema

added.description: `schemalint generate` command to generate JSON Schema from Go struct types
Support for both local (GOPATH/src) and remote Go modules in schema generation
GitHub Actions release workflow for GoReleaser

fixed.description: Fix .gitignore pattern to not exclude cmd/schemalint/ files

highlights.description: Rename to schemalint and add scale profile for strict static type compatibility

added.description: `--profile` / `-p` flag to select linting profile (`default`, `scale`)
Scale profile with `composition-disallowed` rule: disallow `anyOf`, `oneOf`, `allOf`
Scale profile with `additional-properties-disallowed` rule: disallow `additionalProperties: true`
Scale profile with `missing-type` rule: require explicit `type` field
Scale profile with `mixed-type-disallowed` rule: disallow type arrays like `["string", "number"]`
Goreleaser configuration for cross-platform builds and Homebrew tap
`--property-case` flag to enforce property naming conventions (e.g., camelCase, snake_case)

changed.description: Update CLI description to emphasize static type compatibility for all languages (Go, Rust, TypeScript, etc.)

documentation.description: README with scale profile docs and Homebrew installation
PRD, TRD, and ROADMAP updated for schemalint

highlights.description: Initial release with JSON Schema linter for Go compatibility

added.description: CLI with `lint` and `version` commands using cobra
JSON Schema parser for linting (supports `$defs`, `definitions`, `anyOf`, `oneOf`)
Union detection with discriminator field analysis
Nullable pattern detection (`anyOf: [T, null]`)
Reference pattern detection (`anyOf: [ComponentReference, BaseXxx]`)
Configurable discriminator field priority (`component_type`, `type`, `kind`)
Multiple output formats: text (default), JSON, GitHub Actions annotations
Exit codes: 0 (ok), 1 (errors), 2 (warnings only)

documentation.description: README with installation and usage instructions
